briefdescription.para: Allocates n bytes of memory, which can then be freed using MR_Free().
Deallocates memory that was previously allocated with MR_Alloc(). Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para: Allocates n bytes of memory, which can then be freed using MR_FreeArray(). For most purposes this is equivalent to MR_Alloc() and MR_Free(), but the deallocation functions are not interchangable. This is a bit weird, but we have to have separate deallocation functions for arrays and non-arrays, because ASAN complains otherwise. So the allocation functions must be provided separately for both too.

briefdescription.para: Deallocates memory that was previously allocated with MR_AllocArray(). Does nothing if the pointer is null.
